name: Rep. Ted Lieu
tweet: "I hope you will come together and make absolutely clear how we, as a Congress and as nation, feel about what President Trump did by convicting him.  It is what our Constitution requires.  And it is what our country deserves."

name: Rep. Ted Lieu
tweet: "Impeachment, conviction and disqualification is not just about the past, it’s about the future.  It’s about making sure that no future official, no future president, does what President Trump did."

name: Rep. Ted Lieu
tweet: "No one is here saying that President Trump cannot contest the election.  But what Trump did, as his former chief of staff explained, was different.  It was dishonorable. It was un-American. And it resulted in fatalities. "

name: Rep. Ted Lieu
tweet: "People in his own party, governors, former officials, current officials, and members of Congress have unambiguously and passionately said that what President Trump did was 'disgraceful' and 'shameful.'"

name: Rep. Ted Lieu
tweet: "Now, Pres. Trump would have his base, & the world, believe that his conduct was totally appropriate.   It is important to impeach that falsehood—to make clear to his supporters, & everyone watching, that what President Trump did was not acceptable. In fact, quite the opposite."

name: Rep. Ted Lieu
tweet: "If you or I make a mistake, and something very bad happens, we would show remorse. We would accept responsibility. But President Trump didn't do any of that. Why not? Because he intended for the events of January 6 to happen. How do we know? He told us."

name: Rep. Ted Lieu
tweet: "President Trump not only has failed to show remorse, or take accountability, he has made clear that he is just beginning."

name: Rep. Ted Lieu
tweet: "We have to hold Trump accountable. To send the message that it is never patriotic to incite a violent attack against our nation's Capitol. And that future Presidents will know that they can't follow in Donald Trump's footsteps and get away with it."

name: Rep. Ted Lieu
tweet: Protecting the popular clauses in the ACA that protects Americans from insurance discrimination seems like a no-brainer. But, for Congressional Republicans and the Trump Administration, their unending efforts to roll back health protections are as heartless as they are senseless.

name: Rep. Ted Lieu
tweet: Protections for those with pre-existing health conditions remains a high priority for our constituents and it’s shocking that the Trump Administration is unwilling to stand up for families facing costly medical bills because of the whims of insurance companies. #ProtectOurCare

name: Rep. Ted Lieu
tweet: The ACA prevents employer-sponsored health plans from excluding pre-existing health coverage. The Trump Admin’s decision not to defend this provision means 17,546,000 Californians with employer-sponsored insurance may be at risk of losing protections, including 382,000 in #CA33.

name: Rep. Ted Lieu
tweet: Thousands could lose health coverage and face exorbitant healthcare cost increases because the Trump Admin won’t defend every American’s right to affordable, quality coverage. In #CA33, 22,000 constituents with pre-existing health conditions are at risk of coverage denials.

name: Rep. Ted Lieu
tweet: As many as 856,000 older Californians may lose federal protections against coverage denials or premium increases as a result of the Trump Admin’s actions, including 34,000 in #CA33. Report shows 19,000 older adults in our district would bear the full cost of premium increases too

name: Rep. Ted Lieu
tweet: As a result of the Trump Administration’s actions, as many as 1,212,000 women in California who currently purchase coverage through the individual market may lose federal protections because of their gender. 26,000 women in #CA33 could bear the full cost of premium increases.

name: Rep. Ted Lieu
tweet: Under the Affordable Care Act, insurance companies can't charge women more based on gender. Right here in #CA33, 47,000 women are at risk of coverage denials or premium increases if President Trump and the GOP have their way and further undermine America’s health care system.

name: Rep. Ted Lieu
tweet: If President Trump and Republicans succeed in rolling back pre-existing condition protections, 50,000 #CA33 constituents with pre-existing health conditions are at risk of coverage loss or premium increases. #ProtectOurCare
